title: SCP-902 | The Final Countdown
description: An old, ticking bullet box. Whatever's inside must be destroyed at all costs.
body:
![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_e4c0fe06-d130-4c7d-b828-fc5f58ea48c5.png) *** **The Final Countdown** mod adds three new items _(SCP, documentation, label)_, one structure and 62+ unique messages and events to the game. The mod is heavily inspired by **SCP-902** from the **SCP Foundation Universe**. **SCP-902** is an old, ticking bullet box. Whatever is inside must be destroyed at all costs. **●** **Mod** __made by__ : TheCaptainFoxy (me) **●** **SCP-902 Model and animations** __made by__ : Wraith ● __Mod created with__ MCreator ● Requires  GeckoLib forge 1.20.1 ● Join __my discord__ for __support/question/suggestions/sneak-peaks__ and more! _TCF Discord_ **●** Mod inspired by zcoper's mods         __FAQ__ 
Spoiler

 ► Where can I find the mod content?

SCP-902, its documentation, and its label can only be found inside the SCP-902 containment chamber structure.

 

► Where does the structure spawn?

The structure spawns only in snowy/frozen biomes at surface level, with approximately one structure every 4,000 blocks.

 

You can find it using /locate command

 

► How can I place the document?

Right-click to read the document.  
Shift + right-click to place it.

  *** ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_18fd35d7-05d3-4c60-b3bb-77309557715f.png) *** ![SCP-902](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4988eb3a305e58273d60ebb7d3317be34f26f15a.gif)

SCP-902 | The Final Countdown

*** **SCP-902** is _"The Final Countdown"_, an old, ticking bullet box. **Whatever is inside must be destroyed at all costs**. Anyone who hears the **ticking sound** from **SCP-902** will recognize it as a "__countdown__". Anyone who learns about **SCP-902** through __viewing it__ or __reading the document__ will feel compelled to __destroy whatever is inside the box__ at **all costs,** but only at __the end of the countdown__, __not before__.  Keeping **SCP-902** in your __inventory__ will __still cause it to tick__, causing **paranoia** in the holder, expressed through __various messages__ from the subject at intervals of up to 5 minutes maximum. Opening the placed **SCP-902** will __reveal what is inside__ and what __must be destroyed__.

_There's something. There's nothing. What's ticking?_

Once the subject has seen **SCP-902**, they will enter a **paranoid state,** unable to stop thinking about it . Every __10 minutes or less__, they may experience **visions of the box**, **hear its ticking**, or **express their paranoid thoughts through messages**. Attempting to break **SCP-902** will result in an __immediate camera shift__, followed by __messages expressing the player's thoughts__ on why they should __not break the box before the countdown ends__. To pick up **SCP-902** **without breaking it**, **Shift + right click on it**.   **62+** __unique messages and events__. _**The Final Countdown** is compatible with **every** mod._ ***   __Show all content__
Spoiler

 

 

 

SCP-902 Containment Chamber

SCP-902 can only be found inside the SCP-902 Containment Chamber/Cell.

The structure spawns only in snowy/frozen biomes at surface level and is rare. 

The facility is equipped with an extreme containment device for emergencies.

  

SCP-902 Document & SCP-902 Label

The SCP-902 documentation can be found inside the SCP-902 Containment Chamber.
The document is readable, while the label provides information about the SCP’s classification and risk level.

 

Once the document has been read, the subject will begin to believe that whatever is contained in SCP-902 must be destroyed only when the countdown ends, not before. 

    _● SCP Document: _        [SCP-902 Document](https://scp-wiki.wikidot.com/scp-902) ● You have permission to use this mod in your modpacks! _● Check out my other Mods:_ _[My CurseForge Profile](https://www.curseforge.com/members/thecaptainfoxy/projects)_ _[My Modrinth Profile](https://modrinth.com/user/TheCaptainFoxy)_
